title: TestGen - AI Test Case Generator
description: An intelligent web app that helps you generate test cases with AI assistance.
detail-project:
### Overview
TestGen is an innovative AI-powered tool designed to streamline the quality assurance process by automatically generating comprehensive test cases based on user requirements or feature descriptions.

### Key Features
*   **AI-Powered Generation**: Leverages advanced LLMs to interpret user input and suggest relevant test scenarios.
*   **Export Options**: Easily export generated test cases to CSV or PDF formats.
*   **Responsive Design**: Built with a modern, mobile-friendly interface for productivity anywhere.

### Impact
Reduced the manual effort of test case creation by up to 60%, allowing QA teams to focus on edge cases and complex logic.

title: Allure + Google Chat Report
description: Allure Reports + Google Chat = real-time test insights and smooth team collaboration.
detail-project:
### Overview
A robust integration between Allure Reporting and Google Chat to provide immediate feedback on automated test executions within the team's communication hub.

### Key Features
*   **Real-time Alerts**: Automatic notifications sent to Google Chat rooms upon test completion.
*   **Summary Dashboards**: Includes high-level pass/fail statistics directly in the chat message.
*   **Deep Linking**: One-click access from the notification to the detailed Allure HTML report.

### Impact
Improved team responsiveness to regression failures and significantly reduced the 'time-to-fix' for critical bugs.

title: Split Bill
description: A smart app for effortless bill splitting and financial management.
detail-project:
### Overview
Split Bill is a lightweight utility designed for friends and groups to manage shared expenses fairly and transparently.

### Key Features
*   **Dynamic Splitting**: Supports equal splits, percentage-based, or specific amount splits.
*   **Expense History**: Local tracking of past transactions and settlements.
*   **Instant Totals**: Real-time calculation as you add items and participants.

### Tech Stack
Developed using vanilla JavaScript and modern CSS to ensure maximum performance and zero external dependencies.

title: QA Portfolio
description: Showcasing my journey as a QA Engineer manual & automation testing, tools mastery, and real-world project impact.
detail-project:
### Overview
A premium personal portfolio designed to showcase professional achievements, technical skills, and a collection of impactful QA projects.

### Key Features
*   **Dynamic Theme**: Seamless switching between light and dark modes.
*   **Interactive Modals**: Detailed project views with rich text support.
*   **Responsive Layout**: Fully optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile views.

### Design Principles
Focuses on clean typography, smooth transitions, and a 'quality-first' aesthetic that reflects my professional background.

title: Gous Studio
description: Company Profile & Booking System for Gous Studio.
detail-project:
### Overview
A comprehensive web solution for a professional photography studio, combining a visual showcase with an integrated booking platform.

### Key Features
*   **Portfolio Gallery**: High-quality image display with optimized loading.
*   **Booking System**: Streamlined interface for clients to schedule sessions.
*   **Admin Dashboard**: Private area for studio owners to manage appointments and content.

### Built with Modern Tech
Utilizes React for interactive components and Tailwind CSS for rapid, maintainable design iterations.
